items.title_en: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.title_zh: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
items.desc_en: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.title_en: Rwandan singer dies as he was being released from prison
items.title_zh: 卢旺达歌手在出狱时去世
items.desc_en: The former university lecturer was a vocal critic of the government and ruling Rwandan Patriotic Front party.
items.desc_zh: 这位前大学讲师是政府和执政的卢旺达爱国阵线党的直言不讳的批评者。

items.title_en: Rosenberg: Russia's Victory Day parade with no tanks a sign Ukraine war not going to plan
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：俄罗斯没有坦克的胜利日阅兵表明乌克兰战争不会计划
items.desc_en: For the first time in nearly two decades, there will be no military hardware, just soldiers during Saturday's parade in Moscow.
items.desc_zh: 周六在莫斯科举行的阅兵式上，近二十年来第一次，将没有任何军事装备，只有士兵。

items.title_en: Planet Fitness stock plunges 30% after company slashes guidance, cancels planned price hikes
items.title_zh: Planet Fitness 大幅削减指导、取消涨价计划后股价暴跌 30%
items.desc_en: Shares of Planet Fitness plunged Thursday after the fitness company slashed its guidance and canceled planned price hikes.
items.desc_zh: 在健身公司大幅削减指导并取消涨价计划后，Planet Fitness 的股价周四暴跌。

items.title_en: Paul Tudor Jones says U.S. is late to regulating AI: 'We should have already done it'
items.title_zh: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 表示美国在监管人工智能方面姗姗来迟：“我们应该已经这么做了”
items.desc_en: The U.S. is locked into a heated rivalry with China and a race to lead AI innovation.
items.desc_zh: 美国与中国陷入了激烈的竞争，并展开了引领人工智能创新的竞赛。

items.title_en: Shake Shack shares crater 30% after burger chain reports operating loss
items.title_zh: 汉堡连锁店报告经营亏损后，Shake Shack 股价暴跌 30%
items.desc_en: Shake Shack CEO Rob Lynch said that winter storms and an increase to its projections for store openings this year weighed on the company's results.
items.desc_zh: Shake Shack 首席执行官罗布·林奇 (Rob Lynch) 表示，冬季风暴和今年开店预测的增加对该公司的业绩造成了压力。

items.title_en: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg set to join Trump on China visit next week
items.title_zh: 波音公司首席执行官凯利·奥特伯格将于下周与特朗普一起访华
items.desc_en: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg is expected to join President Donald Trump on his visit to China next week, a source familiar with the planemaker's plans told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 一位熟悉波音公司计划的消息人士告诉 CNBC，波音公司首席执行官凯利·奥特伯格预计将于下周与唐纳德·特朗普总统一起访问中国。

items.title_en: Ryan Cohen's mysterious bank letter backing GameStop's eBay bid reveals a big issue with deal
items.title_zh: 瑞安·科恩（Ryan Cohen）神秘的银行信件支持 GameStop 收购 eBay，揭示了交易中的一个大问题
items.desc_en: The combined company would need to maintain an investment-grade credit profile, GameStop's mysterious financing letter said.
items.desc_zh: GameStop 神秘的融资信称，合并后的公司需要保持投资级信用状况。

items.title_en: An energy name in Josh Brown's Best Stocks list just completed a big merger, adding to its bull case

items.desc_zh: 乔什·布朗和肖恩·罗素来看看他们名单上这个新成立的能源巨头。

items.title_en: OpenAI trial: Mother of Musk's children says he offered Altman a Tesla board seat

items.desc_en: Shivon Zilis, a former OpenAI board member who has four children with Musk, testified that the Tesla CEO wanted the AI startup to join his EV company.
items.desc_zh: 前 OpenAI 董事会成员 Shivon Zilis 与马斯克育有四个孩子，他作证说特斯拉首席执行官希望这家人工智能初创公司加入他的电动汽车公司。

items.title_zh: Superdry联合创始人詹姆斯·霍尔德因强奸罪入狱

items.title_en: France is fan favorite for the FIFA World Cup — but AI is backing another nation for glory, says BofA
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，法国是世界杯球迷的最爱，但人工智能正在支持另一个国家争取荣耀

items.title_en: S&P hits fresh record as oil continues pullback on hope U.S.-Iran deal is close: Live updates

items.title_en: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌12%
items.desc_en: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title_en: This 'win-win' hedge trade is getting popular with traders
items.title_zh: 这种“双赢”的对冲交易越来越受到交易者的欢迎
items.desc_en: The trade is fairly simple: sell downside protection in semiconductor names where volatility is expensive, and buy downside protection in the S&P 500, where it's relatively cheap.
items.desc_zh: 交易相当简单：在波动性较高的半导体股中卖出下行保护，并在相对便宜的标准普尔 500 指数中买入下行保护。
